function parseCookies(req) { var c = {}, h = (req.headers && req.headers.cookie) || ""; h.split(";").forEach(function(s) { var i = s.indexOf("="); if (i > 0) { var k = s.slice(0, i).trim(), v = s.slice(i + 1).trim(); try { c[k] = decodeURIComponent(v); } catch (e) { c[k] = v; } } }); return c; } function getUser(req) { var c = parseCookies(req); if (!c.mm_user) return null; try { return JSON.parse(c.mm_user); } catch (e) { return null; } } var user = getUser(msg.req); // ── 未登入 ── if (!user) { msg.payload = "請先登入
